mapper.select: select p.id, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.image, p.likes, p.comments, p.date, p.user_id, p.user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, p.status, p.is_top from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id where p.status = 1 order by p.is_top desc, p.id desc

select p.id, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.image, p.likes, p.comments, p.date, p.user_id, p.user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, p.status, p.is_top from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id where p.category = #{category} and p.status = 1 order by p.is_top desc, p.id desc

select p.id, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.image, p.likes, p.comments, p.date, p.user_id, p.user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, p.status, p.is_top from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id where p.user_id = #{userId} order by p.is_top desc, p.id desc

select p.id, p.category, p.title, p.content, p.image, p.likes, p.comments, p.date, p.user_id, p.user_name, u.avatar as user_avatar, p.status, p.is_top from post p left join user u on p.user_id = u.id where p.status = 0 order by p.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into post(category, title, content, image, likes, comments, date, user_id, user_name, status, is_top) values(#{category}, #{title}, #{content}, #{image}, #{likes}, #{comments}, #{date}, #{user_id}, #{user_name}, #{status}, #{is_top})
mapper.update: update post set likes = likes + 1 where id = #{id}
update post set comments = comments + 1 where id = #{id}
update post set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
update post set is_top = #{isTop} where id = #{id}
